title: lexer: text: header-line comment rejected (RFC 5228 §2.3)
description:
TRIGGER: RFC 5228 §2.3.1 permits an optional hash-comment on the 'text:' header line before the terminating newline, e.g. 'text: # a comment
hello
.
'. The lexer currently requires the character immediately after 'text:' to be CR, LF, or CRLF. If any other character follows, it returns Err('expected newline after text:'). BAD BEHAVIOR: valid RFC 5228 scripts with text: comments fail to tokenize. Fix: after consuming 'text:', skip optional whitespace and an optional # comment before requiring the newline.
